title: The Puppy Next Door
synopsis: A new puppy moves in next door and brings energy, noise, and joy to the street.
sentences: One morning, Mia heard excited barking outside her house.
She ran to the window and saw her new neighbors carrying a small brown puppy.
The puppy's ears were too big for his head, and his tail moved very fast.
Mia asked if she could come outside to say hello.
The neighbors smiled and told her the puppy's name was Rusty.
Rusty tried to chew Mia's shoelace as soon as she sat down.
Everyone laughed, including Mia's mother at the front gate.
Later that week, Mia helped fill Rusty's water bowl in the garden.
She learned that puppies need food, walks, rest, and lots of patience.
Sometimes Rusty was noisy, and sometimes he was muddy.
But every time Mia saw him run across the grass, she smiled.
The puppy next door made the whole street feel more cheerful.
